---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="75%"}

# Home

**Senior Data Scientist · AI/ML**

I build ML systems at the intersection of fraud detection, graph neural networks, and agentic AI. Currently at Mastercard's AI Centre of Excellence, designing multi-agent pipelines for cloud operations. My work spans production fraud scoring, sequential behavioral modeling, and research on temporal graph learning — with two conference publications and three patents filed.

<br>

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-0A66C2?style=flat&logo=linkedin&logoColor=white)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nikhilt97/)
[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-181717?style=flat&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/NikhilT-DS)
[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Google_Scholar-4285F4?style=flat&logo=googlescholar&logoColor=white)](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=_ehXengAAAAJ)
[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Kaggle-20BEFF?style=flat&logo=kaggle&logoColor=white)](https://www.kaggle.com/nikhiltumbde)

:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}

<br><br>

![](assets/profile.jpg){.rounded-circle width="140" fig-alt="Nikhil Tumbde"}

:::

::::

---

## Focus areas

`Fraud detection` &nbsp; `Graph neural networks` &nbsp; `Multi-agent systems` &nbsp; `LLM fine-tuning` &nbsp; `Sequential modeling`

PyTorch · PySpark · XGBoost · GRU · AWS Bedrock · Databricks

---

## Experience

::: {.timeline}

**Feb 2026 – present** &emsp; **Senior Data Scientist** — Mastercard, AI Centre of Excellence

Multi-agent system (POC live) on AWS Bedrock AgentCore to automate cloud ops L1 alert triage across 500–1,000 daily alerts. Designed alert correlation across time, topology, and dependency graphs.

---

**May 2023 – Feb 2026** &emsp; **Data Scientist II → Senior Data Scientist** — Mastercard, AI Garage

End-to-end fraud and risk models (XGBoost, GRU) for token provisioning and card-level behavioral embeddings. Revenue impact of $12M+, 18% TFPR reduction, two patents filed.

---

**Oct 2022 – Apr 2023** &emsp; **Data Science Intern** — Mastercard, AI Garage

Research on temporal GNN architectures for financial graph datasets. Work published at ICAIF'23.

---

**Jul 2021 – Oct 2021** &emsp; **Assistant Manager, IT** — Niva Bupa Health Insurance

Automated sales KPI dashboard in Sisense and MySQL for real-time performance tracking.

:::

---

## Selected research

| | |
|---|---|
| **Kernelized Edge Attention: Addressing Semantic Attention Blurring in Temporal GNNs** <br> *Waghmare, Leel, Tumbde et al.* | `AAAI 2026` |
| **Learning Representations in Temporal Bipartite Financial Graphs** <br> *Nath, Waghmare, Tumbde et al.* | `ICAIF 2023` |
| **Methods and systems for determining risk associated with tokenization of payment cards** <br> *Patent filed* | `Patent` |
| **Methods and systems for managing default risk associated with transit transactions** <br> *Patent filed* | `Patent` |

[→ Full list on the Research page](research.qmd)

---

## Education

**IIM Calcutta · IIT Kharagpur · ISI Kolkata** &emsp; *Oct 2021 – May 2023* \
Post Graduate Diploma in Business Analytics · CGPA 9.44

**Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology** &emsp; *Jul 2015 – May 2019* \
B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering · CGPA 8.02
